title: Aaron Tay
text: Home * People * Aaron Tay Aaron Tay [1] Aaron Tay Chee Hsien , a Singaporean Resource Librarian at National University of Singapore , computer chess enthusiast and early WinBoard promoter. He wrote computer chess articles on various topics [2] , along with his FAQ on Winboard and Chess Engines [3] hosted by Ron Murawski .
